reviews.comment:
Jamás atienden el telefono llevo dias tratando de hablar por un tema administrativo y nada!!!!
Arreglos: precios altiiiiiiisimos. El socio no veo tenga beneficio alguno ahi!!!!!!

(Translated by Google)
They never answer the phone! I've been trying to call for days about an administrative matter and nothing!
Repairs: outrageously expensive! I don't see any benefit for the member there at all!

reviews.comment:
Si lo van a llevar a lavar tengan cuidado con los espejos retrovisores, los rodetes enormes te lo mandan a guardar. Me rompieron la manija del auto y nadie se quiso hacer cargo. No pierdan de vista el auto nunca

(Translated by Google)
If you're going to take it to be washed, be careful with the rearview mirrors; the huge holes will send you packing. They broke my car handle and no one wanted to take responsibility. Never lose sight of the car.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCbDViNTF3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Comparte características comunes del Automóvil Club Argentino. Construcción funcional, limpieza y organización, por ende, fácil acceso a los servicios, comprendiendo demoras obvias por la numerosa concurrencia de usuarios. Dispone de buena cafetería, kiosco y sanitarios pulcros. Personal atento y bien dispuesto.

(Translated by Google)
It shares common characteristics with the Argentine Automobile Club. Functional construction, cleanliness, and organization, therefore, easy access to services, allowing for obvious delays due to large crowds. It has a good cafeteria, a kiosk, and clean restrooms. The staff is attentive and helpful.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCcThXWTR3RRAB
